_agent_review.notes: Reconciled PH Stage A strict labels to deterministic strict-mode findings after manual precision review; retained broader model-derived labels in ideal_must_detect. Narrow precision fixes covered completed DSAR/no-pending controls, PH benefit-ID/BankAcct/doccode phone bait, invalid/placeholder PH TIN, role mailboxes, training-control MNPI bait, and negated/explanatory MAC/MAE prose.

ideal_must_detect.matched_text: avoid storing scans in shared folders beyond 30 days per retention policy
no material non-public information under the SRC should be circulated outside the blackout list
Do not add personal mobile numbers
no name or personal contact accompanies it

must_not_detect.reason: role noun label, not a person or identifier
generic form label and role-only placeholder

uncertain.reason: Philippine SSS numbers are personal identifiers but not covered by an allowed rule in this taxonomy.
PhilHealth IDs are personal identifiers but not covered by an allowed rule in this taxonomy.
Pag-IBIG member IDs are personal identifiers but not covered by an allowed rule in this taxonomy.
Company registration numbers are direct company identifiers but no PH-specific rule is defined here.
ISIN-style security identifiers are relevant for capital markets but not listed as a detectable rule.
BIC/SWIFT codes are financial identifiers but not covered by the allowed rules.
